data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for SMS providers.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for SMS providers (Twilio, MessageBird), but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms their integration or operational status. The linked use case mentions the need for SMS providers, yet lacks specific API interactions or state checks that demonstrate this functionality is implemented. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of successful integration with SMS providers (Twilio, MessageBird).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for SMS provider integration
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that SMS providers (Twilio, MessageBird) are integrated and operational.
